name: image_link
description: Generate g:image_link and g:additional_image_link values from the primary product image and additional gallery images.
description_pl: Generuje g:image_link i g:additional_image_link z głównego zdjęcia produktu oraz dodatkowych zdjęć z galerii.
notes: Uses auction icon image if present, otherwise selects the highest-priority product image as the main image.
